It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses. Tax A

a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses. Tax A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments. Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund. Exit load A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of

exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment. Stamp duty A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a

year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Dhruv Muchhal is the

HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Dhruv Muchhal is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,37,048 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 01 Jun 2026 is ₹151.13. The HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year ; Investment Objective The scheme

Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year ; Investment Objective The scheme seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation /income by investing predominantly in Small-Cap companies.
